Solution

## Optimize Relay Setting For Selective Fault Clearing

Our protection coordination study enables businesses in India to ensure selective fault-clearing, and protecting equipment. Care Labs’ solution offers redundancy and backup protection to ensure minimal downtime in operations.

Support

## We’ve Got You Covered With Extensive Support

At Care Labs, client success is of prime importance for us. Our protection coordination study services encompass unfettered support through and through.

Technical Support:

From system modeling to simulation and report generation, our experts use ETAP so that you get impeccable results.

Safety And Compliance Support:

With electrical safety and reliability, we make your power systems adhere to both local and global safety standards.

Technology

## Equipment Requiring Relay Coordination Study

Care Labs’ protection coordination study encompasses analyzing relays and other protective devices to evaluate their coordination and performance.

With rapid industrialization, it is crucial to protect critical assets from electrical hazards. We help these industries safeguard their devices.
